§6Fölkvangr Field§f

§aThe apocalyptic meltdown of a DFC — a massive destructive field that annihilates everything in its path!§f

A §bFölkvangr Field§f is the catastrophic result of a DFC meltdown. When the DFC's restriction field reaches §e0%§f or heat saturation reaches §e100%§f, the core destabilizes and generates this devastating phenomenon.

§6Causes§f:
§b• Restriction field drops to §e0%§f (stabilizers offline or overwhelmed)
§b• Heat saturation reaches §e100%§f (too many chained emitters)
§b• Critical component failure during operation

§6Effects§f:
§b• Creates a massive destructive field that annihilates blocks in a huge radius
§b• Deals immense damage to all entities
§b• Leaves a permanent scar on the landscape
§b• Can destroy months of base building in seconds

§6Prevention§f:
§b• Always keep multiple stabilizers active and redundant
§b• Monitor restriction field and heat levels constantly
§b• Install a §bHigh Energy Field Jammer§f (suppresses Fölkvangr within §e300-block§f range)
§b• Never exceed the core's heat saturation limit

§eTip§f: A Fölkvangr field is essentially the end of your DFC. The best defense is prevention — overbuild your stabilizers, automate shutdown if parameters exceed safe ranges, and ALWAYS install a High Energy Field Jammer before your first DFC startup.
